user_agreement:
ThinFlashCard User Agreement

By using ThinFlashCard (the "App"), you agree to the following terms:

1. Service
The App provides local flashcard study, spaced review, library management, and JSON backup. Data is stored on your device by default.

2. Acceptable Use
You agree not to misuse the App, attempt unauthorized access, reverse engineer the App, or use it for unlawful purposes.

3. Data & Backup
Learning data is stored locally. You are responsible for backing up important data using export/backup features.

4. Disclaimer
The App is provided "as is" without warranties regarding learning outcomes, data integrity, or third-party availability.

5. Changes
We may update this agreement. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance.

6. Contact
Contact us via in-app Feedback.
privacy_policy:
ThinFlashCard Privacy Policy

1. Local Storage
Your decks, review history, tags, and settings are stored locally in SQLite on your device. We do not upload learning data by default.

2. Network (HTTPS only)
The App may use HTTPS to:
• Fetch FAQ and legal document updates;
• Let you send feedback email via the system mail client.

3. Feedback Logs
When you email feedback, the App may attach a recent local log tail (up to 512KB). Logs leave your device only when you send the email.

4. Third Parties
No ad SDKs are integrated. Text-to-speech uses Apple system voices.

5. Children
The App is not directed at children under 13.

6. Changes
We may update this policy in-app or via remote documents.

7. Contact
Use in-app Feedback to reach us.
